titleStmt.title: SII 5.415: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 415. (A.R. No. 126 of 1894). ON THE OUTSIDE OF THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūviṉkiḻatti mevi viṟṟiruppa metiṉimātu nitiyiṟ puṇara vayap(p)por maṭantai jayappuya
t tiruppa mākkalaimaṭantai vākkiṉil viḷaṅka ticai Irunāṉkum micai nilāveṟippa maṟaineṟi va
rai maṉuneṟi tikaḻa Aṟaneṟic camaiyaṅka ḷāṟun taḻaippak kāṉaveṅkayaiy villuṭaṉ turantu miṉaṅ ka
nakācalattu viṟṟiruppa Eṇkiri cūḻnta Eḻkaṭal Eḻpoḻil veṇ kuṭainiḻaṟṟac ceṅkol naṭappak koṭuṅkali naṭu
ṅki neṭumpilat toḷippa villavar cempiyar virāṭa varāṭavar pallavar niṟaiyuṭaṉ muṟaimuṟai
paṇiya virunemiyaḷavum Orunemi yoṅka Iṉṉamutākiya viyalicaināṭaka maṉṉi vaḷara maṇimuṭi cūṭi
viḷaṅkiya virasiṁ hāsa ṉattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya ṣri koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tribhu- vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulacekara
tevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉmuṉṟāvati ṉetir patiṉmuṉā(mā)māṇṭu Uṭaiyār tirunelveli Uṭaiyār tevatāṉam kiḻve
mpanāṭṭu ve ḷaikkuṭic civacaraṇacekarapperunteruvāṉa civallavapurattu nakarattom Iṉṉāyaṉār nimantakkāṟa
ril tevaṉ muṉṉi vittāṉāṉa Aṉavarattāṉa Iṭakkaimārāyaṉukku piṭipāṭukuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉārkku can
tirātittavaṟ nittanimantam Iṭakkai vaccippatāka tirunelveli ciyaṉ tevaṉāṉa kaṇṭiyatevar Eṅkaḷūri
l Iṭuvitta nilam muṉṟumāvukku nāṅkaḷ Eḻutikkuṭutta kaittaṭippaṭi perunāṉkellaiāvatu
kiḻellai civallavaṉ tirunantavaṉattu melaipperuvaḻikku meṟkum teṉellaimalaiyaṉ vayakkalukku va
ṭakkum melellai vāḻivayakkalukku kiḻakkum v(ā)ṭavellai tirunārāyaṇavacakkal teṉcuvaṟku teṟku
nāṉkellaik kuṭppaṭṭa nilam pam kalloṭu kālpokku kalloṭu ce nilam A2 pa kalālai nilamṟum nāṟ
ṟaṅkā nilam m micuvaṭṭa nilam tma Āka nilam � nilam muṉṟumaāvukku Ivvāṇṭu kārmutal kaṭamai Iṟukkum
iṭattu māttāl nel patiṉkalamāka pū Oṉṟukku nellu muppatiṉkalamum pūvaḻi kārtoṟum kuṭuttu
Ivar kaiyyāl taravukoḷvomākavum Ippaṭi cammaticcu piṭipāṭu kuṭuttom Aṉavaratatāṉa Iṭa
kkaimārāyaṉukku .
Digital edition of SII 5.415 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
